title: Lighthouse Drive
summary: Low beams guide the car like a lighthouse guides a ship through dark water.
memoryHook: Use the light that lets you steer, not the one that blinds you.

title: Moon on Water
summary: Wet road reflections can look calm while hiding real movement.
memoryHook: Shine is not proof of safety.

title: Dockside Beacon
summary: Signals at night must be a clear beacon, not a late afterthought.
memoryHook: Light the turn before you need it.

title: Rain on Glass
summary: Wet pavement changes the whole view, the way rain changes a window.
memoryHook: When the view turns streaky, slow down and refocus.

title: Night Watch
summary: Driving tired is like a night watch that starts to drift off.
memoryHook: A drifting watch misses the next movement.

title: Pier Line
summary: A bike lane at night is a pier line you must keep reading carefully.
memoryHook: Stay beside the line, not on top of it.

title: Fog Bell
summary: A bus stop at night is a bell that warns of hidden movement nearby.
memoryHook: When the bell rings, expect someone to step out.

title: Curb Shadow
summary: A curb at night can hide a person the way a shadow hides depth.
memoryHook: Treat the dark edge as occupied until proven otherwise.
